Ward Against the Shroud.name: Ward Against the Shroud
Ward Against the Shroud.benefit: Once per month, when you would gain a Worn Page penalty for an uncompleted quest, you may choose to completely negate it.

Grand Dispelling.name: Grand Dispelling
Grand Dispelling.benefit: Once per month, you may perform a powerful cleansing ritual. Remove all active Worn Page penalties you currently have.

Flicker of Prophecy.name: Flicker of Prophecy
Flicker of Prophecy.benefit: When pulling genre quests, pull 3 quests and select the one you most want to read

Master of Fates.name: Master of Fates
Master of Fates.benefit: When drawing any quest, draw one additional card from each quest category. Then pick any cards you want up to your pre-determined quest pool number

effects.description: Draw 1 extra card from each quest category, pick up to pool number

Quick Shot.name: Quick Shot
Quick Shot.benefit: Any dungeon room and encounter can be completed by the same book, regardless of prompt

effects.description: Any dungeon room and encounter can be completed by the same book, regardless of prompt

Concussive Blast.name: Concussive Blast
Concussive Blast.benefit: When completing a quest you may choose to also complete the quest to the left or right of the quest card with the same book

effects.description: May also complete quest to left or right with same book

Silver Tongue.name: Silver Tongue
Silver Tongue.benefit: When you complete any quest, you gain an additional +5 Paper Scraps, representing your knack for getting a little extra out of every interaction.

Irresistible Charm.name: Irresistible Charm
Irresistible Charm.benefit: You can choose to automatically complete any encounter prompt with the same book as the dungeon room, who would dare attack you?

effects.description: Auto-complete any encounter with same book as dungeon room

Empowered Bond.name: Empowered Bond
Empowered Bond.benefit: Your connection to your companions intensifies. The Ink Drop or Paper Scrap bonus granted by your equipped Familiar is permanently increased by +5.

Echo Chamber.name: Echo Chamber
Echo Chamber.benefit: You have mastered the art of magical connection. The bonuses granted by each familiar you have equipped are doubled

Alchemic Focus.name: Alchemic Focus
Alchemic Focus.benefit: You gain an additional +5 XP for every book you read outside of your monthly quest pool.

Philosopher's Stone.name: Philosopher's Stone
Philosopher's Stone.benefit: Once per month, you may sacrifice 50 XP to instantly gain 50 Ink Drops and 10 Paper Scraps.
